series_metadata.series_description: These files are used to sell Ohio agricultural products in other countries. These files labeled, for example, "Southeast Asia" and "Western Europe" contain periodicals (magazines, trade journals, etc.) with information on food consumption patterns in different countries and different regions, e.g. the preference for rice over other foods by people in Singapore.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Review files every and dispose of documents that are no longer needed
